zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期调整压力]
zh.content:
目前以太坊/美元（ETH/USD）价格在1962.71附近，处于小幅震荡整理的状态。过去24小时价格变动较小，波动幅度仅为0.38%，说明市场暂时没有明显的趋势，买卖力量较为平衡。短期内，价格可能会维持在1955.85至1965.45的区间内波动。

技术面上，RSI指标未提供最新数据，可能表明市场缺乏强烈的超买或超卖信号。MACD数值为负（-11.47748），显示短期内卖盘力量较强，但没有形成明确的交叉信号。SMA(20)目前在1978.50附近，价格处于其下方，说明短期内价格存在一定的调整压力。

在支撑方面，1955.85是一个关键支撑位，一旦价格跌破该位置，可能会进一步走弱，考验更低的支撑位。阻力方面，1965.45附近的高点可能会构成短期阻力，突破该位置或许能迎来小幅的反弹。

建议投资者在当前区间内保持观望，等待价格突破支撑或阻力位后再做出决策。短期内，保持谨慎，避免过度追涨杀跌。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near **$1962.71**, slightly below the **20-period SMA at $1978.51**, suggesting short-term bearish pressure after failing to reclaim the moving-average resistance. The narrow intraday range between **$1955.85 and $1965.45** indicates consolidation rather than strong directional momentum. Overall structure still reflects a mild corrective phase within a broader sideways market, where buyers have not yet demonstrated sufficient strength to push price back above the short-term trend line.

Momentum indicators provide a cautiously bearish signal. The **MACD value at −11.48** indicates that the faster momentum line remains below the equilibrium zone, reflecting lingering downside pressure from recent sessions. Although the signal line data is unavailable, the negative MACD suggests that bullish momentum has not yet re-established itself. With RSI data missing, price behavior relative to the moving average becomes more significant; sustained trading below the **20-day SMA** typically reinforces short-term bearish bias until reclaimed.

From a structural perspective, **support is forming around $1955**, which coincides with the session low and appears to be a near-term demand zone where buyers have previously stepped in. A breakdown below this level could expose the next support region around **$1935–$1920**, where previous consolidation occurred. On the upside, **resistance sits near $1978–$1985**, aligning with the SMA and recent rejection levels. A decisive move above that area could open the path toward **$2000–$2020**, a psychologically important resistance band.

Traders may consider a cautious strategy while price remains trapped between these technical boundaries. Range traders could look for **short entries near $1975–$1985 resistance** with tight risk controls, while **dip buyers may watch the $1950–$1955 zone** for signs of stabilization. A confirmed breakout above the moving average with increasing volume would favor a short-term bullish reversal. Conversely, sustained trading below **$1950** may signal continuation of the corrective phase and favor defensive positioning.
